title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Craftsvilla - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Craftsvilla - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Craftsvilla invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Digital Marketing Manager at our Srinagar location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Craftsvilla:
Craftsvilla is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Craftsvilla!
